response.body:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<upi:ReqPay xmlns:upi="http://npci.org/upi/schema/">
  <Head ver="1.0" ts="{{now}}" orgId="DEMOPSP" msgId="{{randomValue type='UUID'}}"/>
  <Txn id="TXN001" type="PAY" ts="{{now}}">
    <RespPay>
      <Resp reqMsgId="{{request.pathSegments.[4]}}" result="SUCCESS" errCode="">
        <Ref type="PAYER" seqNum="1" addr="alice@apexupi" settAmount="500.00" settCurrency="INR" approvalNum="ARN-{{randomValue length=6 type='NUMERIC'}}"/>
      </Resp>
    </RespPay>
  </Txn>
</upi:ReqPay>
